name: Section 303 Redemption to Pay Death Taxes

eligibility.description: The value of the corporate stock must exceed 35% of the decedent's adjusted gross estate.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a portion of a stock redemption to be treated as an exchange (qualifying for stepped-up basis) rather than a dividend to pay for estate taxes and funeral expenses.
